title: Osss-10
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image= |name=Osss-10 |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[Hard Merchandise]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Oh, ''great''. We finally got an ID code from this guy. Believe me, he's the ''last'' one I wanted to run into.''"
"''Who is it?''"
"''Osss-10. Now I'm ''sure'' you're bad luck.''"
"''Never heard of him.''"
"''You wouldn't have. That's because ''you're'' an old story, and ''he's'' the latest thing.|N'dru Suhlak and Boba Fett|}} '''Osss-10''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], in the aftermath of the [[Bounty Hunter Wars|breakup]] of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Osss-10 equipped himself with specialized equipment to predict the movements of his adversaries, and he had a number of encounters with the [[hunt saboteur]] [[N'dru Suhlak]], with Osss-10 coming out on top each [[Time/Legends|time]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Osss-10 responded to a call from [[Kuat (person)|Kuat]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], the leader of the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], to neutralize the renowned [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Osss-10 tracked Fett to the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]], where Fett was en route to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] aboard N'dru Suhlak's [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]], and [[Starfighter combat/Legends|attempted]] to apprehend Fett. However, Fett outsmarted Osss-10 by [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] Suhlak's Headhunter toward Osss-10's [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] at full speed, which forced Osss-10 to break away and allowed Fett and Suhlak to successfully make it to Tatooine. ==Biography== ===A new breed of bounty hunter=== {{Quote|Don't you get it? This is all because of what you did when you broke up the old Bounty Hunters Guild. The old rule book's been thrown out, and there's enough chaos in the bounty-hunting environment for totally new ones to start up. New—and better.|N'dru Suhlak, to Boba Fett, on Osss-10's ascent into the bounty hunting profession|}} Osss-10 was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who became a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Osss-10 entered the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunting profession following the [[Bounty Hunter Wars|breakup]] of the ancient [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]], which had regulated the bounty hunting trade, in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Bounty Hunter Wars]] to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. One of a new breed of independent bounty hunters who became active in the aftermath of the Guild's collapse, Osss-10 equipped himself with state-of-the-art equipment, including a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] fitted with advanced technology to predict the actions of his adversaries, which led the [[hunt saboteur]] [[N'dru Suhlak]] to suspect that Osss-10 was being funded by a wealthy backer. By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[Hard Merchandise]]'' depicts Osss-10's encounter with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] as occurring concurrently with the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Osss-10 had had a number of encounters with Suhlak, in which Osss-10 demonstrated his prowess as a bounty hunter and came out on top on each occasion. ===Encounter with Boba Fett=== {{Quote|So what are your plans?''"
"''What difference does it make? I already threw my best stuff at this guy. The only thing I can think of to do is…give up.|N'dru Suhlak and Boba Fett, during their battle with Osss-10|}} Around the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Kuat (person)|Kuat]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], the leader of the renowned [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], sent out word that he wanted the bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] intercepted and preferably [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Kuat sought to have him eliminated, as Fett had gained information about a plot by Kuat to frame [[Dark Prince|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate for the deaths of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Beru Whitesun Lars|aunt]] and [[Owen Lars/Legends|uncle]]. Many bounty hunters thus began searching for Fett, and Osss-10 was among those who joined the hunt. Fett set out for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] on a mission to recover a [[Espionage droid|spy droid]] that contained evidence of Kuat's effort to frame Xizor. In an attempt to arrive on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] world unhindered by the bounty hunters searching for him, Fett hired N'dru Suhlak to transport him to Tatooine. Fett and Suhlak arrived in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] aboard Suhlak's modified [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] and set a course for Tatooine. Osss-10 detected the Headhunter using his starship's advanced [[Sensor/Legends|detection]] capabilities and [[Scanner|scanned]] Suhlak's ship from a distance, seeking to obtain enough data on its movements to enable him to predict the Headhunter's path and speed. Osss-10 then moved in to [[Starfighter combat/Legends|attack]] the Headhunter and opened fire, with his shots striking Suhlak's ship's exterior [[Hull/Legends|hull]]. Suhlak veered his Headhunter off on a different course to evade the bounty hunter, but Osss-10 foresaw Suhlak's move and maneuvered his ship to intercept the Headhunter. With a ruse that Osss-10 had not predicted, Fett took to the controls of Suhlak's vessel and flew toward Osss-10's ship at full speed. Forced to veer off-course in order to avoid a collision, Osss-10 flew his ship at full thrust toward the Headhunter, firing at it with his [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] as he passed it and zooming out of range of the Headhunter. Having outsmarted Osss-10, Fett and Suhlak then safely landed on Tatooine, where Fett successfully recovered the [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that he sought. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|So much for your new breed of bounty hunter. He might be able to predict what you're going to do—but he can't predict what I'm going to do. Nobody can.|Boba Fett, to N'dru Suhlak, on Osss-10|}} Osss-10 was a skilled bounty hunter who specialized in defeating his opponents by predicting their moves and outsmarting them. N'dru Suhlak considered Osss-10 to be a better bounty hunter than most of the hunters of the defunct Bounty Hunters' Guild. Osss-10 also had a talent for [[Computer/Legends|computer]] [[Programmer/Legends|programming]], which he used to program the onboard computers on his starship. During his encounter with Boba Fett and N'dru Suhlak in the Tatoo [[Star system/Legends|system]], Osss-10 was confident that he could predict Suhlak's course of action and that the pair could not escape him. However, he failed to predict Fett's actions and was therefore unsuccessful at defeating them. ==Equipment== {{Quote|Somebody with a lot of credits must be bankrolling him: he's got all the state-of-the-art equipment, plus he's a real genius at programming his onboard computers. He's got some kind of predictive algorithms wired into his gear that I've never encountered before. The more confrontations you have with him, the bigger operational database he has to extrapolate from about what your next moves are going to be—just like he did right now. If he gets much smarter, next he's going to be able to know what I'm going to do before I know!|N'dru Suhlak, on Osss-10|}} Osss-10 possessed state-of-the-art equipment and a customized starship fitted with computers programmed with predictive [[algorithm]]s, which the bounty hunter used to predict the courses of action of his adversaries. The algorithms drew upon an operational database recording the results of Osss-10's confrontations with his targets, and the more battles that Osss-10 had, the better the database became at predicting his opponents' moves. The vessel had a set of [[Laser/Legends|laser]] [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]] located on its prow and was also equipped with a multi-frequency scanning and lock-on device that could scan other starships from a long distance away. ==Behind the scenes== Osss-10 was created by author [[K. W. Jeter]] for the [[1999]] novel ''[[Hard Merchandise]]'', the third installment of ''[[The Bounty Hunter Wars]]'' trilogy. The novel did not specify Osss-10's [[Species/Legends|species]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Hard Merchandise]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Osss-10 }} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]]
